pages.text:
§7§lMINER'S
   ANECDOTE§r

§7§oTales and truths
from one who spent
a lifetime listening
to the stones...§r

§8— The Old Prospector

§7§lThe Speaking Stones§r

§7§oEvery block you
break whispers back.
Most never hear it.

But sometimes, the
earth rewards those
who listen... with
treasures beyond
common ore.§r

§7§lOf Fortune's Touch§r

§7§oA pickaxe blessed
with fortune does
more than multiply
your gems, child.

It tells the earth
you are worthy of
her deeper secrets.
The dreams follow.§r

§7§lThe Gentle Hand§r

§7§oSome miners prefer
the silk touch —
a gentler way.

The earth remembers
kindness too. She
offers different
gifts to those who
take without
destroying.§r

§7§lThe Dreamer's Path§r

§7§oThe rarest veins
only reveal themselves
to dreamers who have
proven themselves.

Build your dreams
first, young one.
Then the mountains
will open for you.§r

§7§lEach Land Remembers§r

§7§oThe frozen peaks
hide frost. The
badlands guard
orcish steel. The
void's edge holds
mythril.

Where you dig
matters as much
as how you dig.§r

§7§lThe Journey Below§r

§7§oThey speak of tools
that can harvest
entire veins... of
armor that lets you
see in the dark.

Such things exist
for those whose
dreams burn bright.

§8Dig deep, friend.§r
